heading: View Backup Policies
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo return the details of the backup policy for the cluster you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas backups schedule describe <clusterName> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas backups schedule describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-backups-schedule-describe).**Ui:**Atlas UIUse the Backup Policy Editor to configure a backup policy for
Cloud Backups.
